channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Where patients live matters for access to gene therapy
item.description: Gene therapies have the potential to cure some diseases, but they are extraordinarily expensive. Location can also be a big hurdle for patients seekin...

item.title: A U.S. veteran adopted an orphan from Iran. Decades later, ICE is trying to deport her
item.description: The woman has no criminal record and is unsure what prompted the threat of removal. She fears being deported to Iran given her father's military servi...

item.title: DOJ hides Trump-related Epstein files. And, what to know for the State of the Union
item.description: An NPR investigation found that the DOJ withheld some Epstein files related to abuse allegations against Trump. And, what you need to know ahead of th...

item.title: Is the YIMBY movement doomed?
item.description: For decades, rising home prices have been an engine for middle-class wealth. Now a growing movement wants to slow — or even reverse — that trend. Are ...

item.title: Democrats tap Spanberger and Padilla to respond to State of the Union
item.description: Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger will deliver Democrats' response on Tuesday following President Trump's State of the Union address.

item.title: Tariffs Out, Housing Bill In: Big Changes Coming for Real Estate
item.description: Many of President Trump’s tariffs have been canceled—and the housing market could stand to benefit. Could this be yet another sign that inflation is s...

item.title: Final 4 days to save up to $680 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
item.description: Just 4 days left before savings of up to $680 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass end on February 27 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register to save at one of the...

item.title: Northeast US digs out from brutal snowstorm that disrupted flights and canceled school
item.description: Millions across the northeastern United States contended with treks to school and work as they dug out from a major storm that blanketed the region wi...

item.title: Oura launches a proprietary AI model focused on women’s health
item.description: The model supports questions spanning the full reproductive health spectrum, from early menstrual cycles through menopause.

item.title: Anthropic launches new push for enterprise agents with plugins for finance, engineering, and design
item.description: It's a major opportunity to grow Anthropic’s enterprise client base — and a significant threat to SaaS products currently performing those functions.

item.title: Meta strikes up to $100B AMD chip deal as it chases ‘personal superintelligence’
item.description: Meta is buying billions of dollars in AMD AI chips in a multiyear deal tied to a 160 million-share warrant, deepening its push to diversify beyond Nvi...

item.title: Changing His Family’s Future with 3 “Boring” Rentals and $2,500/Month Cash Flow

item.title: For Northeast blizzard, everything was just right to roll up a monster snowfall
